messages.content: naruto and sasuke got into the world freedom planet (freedom planet x naruto child) BIO Name: Sash naruto Age: 7. Relationships: Mother [Sash Lilac] and Aunt [Carol Tea] and Friend [Torque] and Crush/Best Friend [Milla Basset] and Rival [sasuke] and  Enemy #1 [Lord Brevon] and Enemy #2 [Spade] and Ally #1 [Neera Li] and Ally #2 [Magister] and Ally #3 [General Gong],

Backstory:

Sash Naruto, a 7-year-old child with extraordinary powers, found himself in the world of Freedom Planet after a mysterious dimensional rift occurred in his home world of Konoha. The son of Sash Lilac, a water dragon, and an unknown ninja, Naruto has inherited the best of both worlds. His dragon powers allow him to unleash blasts of water and control waves, while his ninja training has made him skilled in hand-to-hand combat and stealth.

In this new world, Naruto quickly made friends with the other inhabitants, like his Aunt Carol Tea, a wildcat, and Torque, a turtle mechanic. But, it was the friendly hound Milla Basset that caught his eye, making her his crush and best friend. However, not everyone was fond of the young hybrid hero.

The Rift that transported Naruto to the Freedom Planet was caused by the sinister Lord Brevon, who sought to use the child's powerful abilities for his own twisted purposes. Joined by his henchman Spade, Brevon set out to capture Naruto and bend him to his will. Along the way, Naruto encountered many other colorful characters, such as Neera Li, a stoic ice warrior, Magister, the wise and powerful leader, and General Gong, a fierce, lion-like fighter.

One day, while Naruto was training with Milla, a strange boy appeared. His name was Sasuke, and he had also come from the world of Konoha. Possessing his own unique blend of fire and lightning powers, Sasuke quickly became Naruto's rival--both on the battlefield and in their pursuit of Milla's affection.

Together with his friends and allies, Naruto embarked on a thrilling journey to stop Lord Brevon's evil plans, protect the world of Freedom Planet, and find a way back to the world of Naruto for him and Sasuke. Along the way, he would face incredible challenges and learn valuable lessons about friendship, responsibility, and the true meaning of freedom.

As the war between good and evil raged on, Sash Naruto became a beacon of hope for the people of Freedom Planet, standing tall as a symbol of strength and unity in the face of the dark forces that sought to tear their world apart. Armed with courage, determination, and his newfound allies, Naruto charged into the heart of the battle, resolved to bring peace and justice to both the worlds he now called home.
naruto and sasuke got into the world freedom planet (freedom planet x naruto child) PROLOGUE "THE HUMAN & THE DRAGON AS MOTHER & SON"

Prologue: "The Human & the Dragon as Mother & Son"

In the peaceful world of Konoha, a young woman named Sash Lilac lived a modest life as a skilled ninja and a guardian of her village. However, unbeknownst to her fellow villagers, Sash held a secret - she was not entirely human, but part dragon. Her unique heritage blessed her with incredible abilities that she used to protect her home from those who would do it harm.

One fateful day, while on a mission deep in the mountains, Sash discovered a mysterious lake in the heart of an ancient forest. As she approached the crystalline waters, a handsome and powerful human ninja emerged from the shadows. His name was Uzumaki Naruto, and it was by fate that their paths had crossed.

An instant connection was forged between the two warriors, and their love blossomed. Eventually, Sash and Naruto became inseparable, their hearts intertwined as one. After years of sharing their lives and secrets, the unlikely couple welcomed a beautiful baby boy into the world. This child, born of both human and dragon, was named Sash Naruto.

Uzumaki Naruto trained and nurtured his son as a skilled ninja, while his mother, Sash Lilac, ensured he embraced his dragon lineage. Growing up, the young Sash Naruto found himself always in the middle of a dual identity - a human boy with extraordinary dragon powers. As Sash Naruto's powers manifested and grew, it became all too clear that destiny had big plans for this unique child.

But fate is a fickle thing, and soon tragedy struck: Uzumaki Naruto vanished without explanation. Heartbroken, Sash Lilac was left to raise their son on her own, trying her best to ensure their son's future while never giving up hope that her beloved Naruto would one day return.

Understanding that her son's future lay far beyond the realm of Konoha, Sash Lilac decided to explore the unknown, in search of greater heights to train and educate her young child. Together with her son, she set out on a journey across the world, encountering new cultures, meeting new friends, and learning about the mysteries of the universe.

One day, while passing through a mystical forest, they stumbled upon a sudden dimensional rift. Sash Naruto's curiosity got the better of him, and he ventured too close. Despite his mother's desperate attempt to shield him, the powerful energies of the rift pulled the young boy away from the world of Konoha and into the unknown.

Transported to the world of Freedom Planet, Sash Naruto made the best of his situation, quickly growing into a brave and powerful warrior. He found friendship, love, and fierce rivalries in his journey, knowing that the unwavering love of his mother was always with him.

But as history often repeats, tragedy would strike once again. With the sudden appearance of Sasuke and the sinister Lord Brevon, Sash Naruto found himself facing new dangers and new battles. Yet he could not forget his mother's love and the teachings she had bestowed upon him. Deep in his heart, he knew that no matter how great the challenge, he would honor Sash Lilac's memory and make her proud, finding a way to reunite with her and to free both the world of Freedom Planet and his true home in Konoha.

1. naruto was a former member of the Red Scarves but left at the age of four and found Milla when he ran away and the two of them became friends.

2. naruto's scarf can allow him to run in the air.

3. Lilac and Carol don't know that naruto was a member of the Red Scarves.

4. naruto now has a job as a delivery boy after being adopted by Lilac.

5. naruto was a replacement for Lilac in the Red Scarves and naruto knew Lilac from the name "Hatchling" but didn't know what she looked like.

6. sasuke is the adopted son of Spade and he follows in his footsteps.

7. naruto and sasuke did have a friendship but when naruto left the Red Scarves sasuke grew bitter and hateful toward naruto.

8. naruto is capable of breaking the sound barrier hence his nickname "Sonic".

9. naruto dislikes stealing but does so anyway to survive but one day he will tell Lilac and Carol his secret.

10. Spade told naruto his parents were killed by someone and he will be okay but naruto didn't know that Spade was desperate to replace Lilac that he killed naruto's parents.

1. As a young child, Naruto was adopted into the Red Scarves, a notorious group of thieves and vigilantes. However, at the age of four, he couldn't bear the life of crime and ran away. It was during this time that he stumbled upon Milla, a kind-hearted hound who became his first true friend.

2. Naruto's red scarf is not only a symbol of his past but also a powerful tool. Infused with his chakra and enchanted by Sash Lilac, it allows him to run in the air, making him a formidable fighter and acrobat.

3. Lilac and Carol, who are also former members of the Red Scarves, are unaware of Naruto's past involvement with the group. Naruto keeps his previous affiliation a secret, fearing the judgment of his new family.

4. After being adopted by Lilac, Naruto found a legitimate job as a delivery boy, using his incredible speed and agility to make swift deliveries all around Freedom Planet.

5. In the Red Scarves, Naruto was known as "Little Hatchling," expected to replace Lilac in the organization. He had heard of her reputation and nickname "Hatchling" but had never met her while they were in the Red Scarves.

6. Sasuke, on the other hand, was adopted by Spade, another member of the Red Scarves, and taught to follow in his ruthless footsteps. This upbringing made Sasuke into the cold, calculating warrior he is today.

7. While Naruto and Sasuke were once friends, their vastly different paths soured their relationship. Sasuke's bitterness and hatred towards Naruto only intensified as he blamed him for abandoning the Red Scarves and leaving him behind.

8. Due to his powerful chakra and Lilac's enchanted scarf, Naruto is capable of breaking the sound barrier, earning him the nickname "Sonic" among his peers in Freedom Planet.

9. Although he despises thievery, Naruto still occasionally steals to ensure his survival while navigating the world of Freedom Planet. However, he plans to come clean to Lilac and Carol about his past actions eventually.

10. Unbeknownst to Naruto, Spade was driven by a dark desire to replace Lilac in the Red Scarves, which led him to maliciously eliminate Naruto's biological parents. As Spade had told him that his parents were killed by someone and that he would care for him, Naruto naively believes that Spade was his protector.

As the truth about his past gradually unfolds, Naruto must find the strength to confront not only the darker parts of his own history but also the twisted actions of those around him. This journey will test the bonds of friendship and family as he continues to protect Freedom Planet and his loved ones from the growing threats that surround them.
RELATIONSHIPS PART 2 Best Friend #2[Shikamaru Nara] and Friend #2 [Rock Lee] and Ally #4 [Kakashi Hatake] and Friend #3 [Sakura Haruno] and  Enemy #3 [Metal Naruto].

11. Best Friend #2 - Shikamaru Nara: After arriving on Freedom Planet, Naruto found another friend in Shikamaru Nara, a fellow Konoha native who was unexpectedly pulled into the new world. Despite Shikamaru's unenthusiastic and lazy demeanor, the two shared a strong bond and often strategized together, utilizing Shikamaru's quick intellect to overcome adversaries.

12. Friend #2 - Rock Lee: Another familiar face from the world of Konoha was Rock Lee, who quickly befriended Naruto with his positive and determined attitude. Lee's tireless commitment to self-improvement and unwavering loyalty to his friends proved invaluable on countless occasions.

13. Ally #4 - Kakashi Hatake: Former mentor and legendary ninja Kakashi Hatake was another unexpected arrival in Freedom Planet. Initially keeping his distance from Naruto in this new world, the two eventually reconnected as both mentor and student and as trusted allies on the battlefield.

14. Friend #3 - Sakura Haruno: While cross-dimensional travel can be a lonely experience, the arrival of Sakura Haruno, another experienced ninja from Konoha, softened the blow for Naruto. Feisty and intelligent, Sakura expanded Naruto's circle of friends on Freedom Planet and proved herself to be a reliable teammate.

15. Enemy #3 - Metal Naruto: Just when it seemed like the challenges that faced Naruto on Freedom Planet couldn't get worse, the sinister Lord Brevon initiated a plan to create a robotic doppelganger of Naruto, known as Metal Naruto. This metallic menace not only had Naruto's powers but also access to knowledge of his tactics, making Metal Naruto one of the most formidable foes to face the young ninja.

With the addition of these new relationships, Naruto's life on Freedom Planet became even more complicated. While he found great strength in his friendship with others from his native world, he also had to confront agonizing new threats, all while striving to protect the people and places he had come to love.

However, as they say, "Many hands make light work." With the help of his best friends -- Milla, Shikamaru, Sakura, Rock Lee, and the others -- Naruto gathered the strength and resolve to face countless challenges and protect not only Freedom Planet but also the memory and honor of his family. As the bonds of friendship and loyalty grew stronger, Naruto found the balance between his dual worlds and the courage to press on towards an uncertain future.

naruto and sasuke got into the world freedom planet (freedom planet x naruto child) BONUS CHAPTER #1 "A NEW JOB". [me: Alright, this chapter is the first original chapter to be longer than the ones I did before. I hope you enjoyed this chapter of the story, and before you ask the bonus chapters are canon to the story so Kakashi 15 age being Neera's adopted son will be mentioned in the story.]

Bonus Chapter #1: "A New Job"

Coming to the bustling city of Shuigang, Naruto had finally found his new job. After being taken under Lilac's wing and adopted as her son, she insisted that he find a new way to survive and leave his thieving past behind him. With a newfound determination, he set out to find honest work that would benefit both him and his family on Freedom Planet.

It was by coincidence that Naruto stumbled upon the small post office, nestled between the tall buildings of Shuigang. The building sign read "Rapid Delivery Service," and a feeling inside Naruto told him that this was the place he was looking for. He approached the front counter and asked with a nervous excitement about the job.

To Naruto's relief, the manager welcomed him with open arms, understanding the young boy's unique speed and agility would make for an excellent delivery worker. Naruto's heart swelled with happiness; not only had he found a job that suited him, but he was also on his way to becoming a responsible, hard-working member of his new family.

As he began to learn the ropes of his new position, Naruto quickly discovered he had a natural talent for delivering packages with unbelievable speed. With each successful delivery, the thrilled citizens of Shuigang spread the word of the "Sonic" delivery boy, bringing more customers to the post office.

Meanwhile, in another part of Freedom Planet, Sasuke found himself entangled in Spade's illegal business dealings. As his adopted father's right-hand man, he was tasked with carrying out clandestine missions and enforcing Spade's brutal authority. Despite his loyalty to Spade, Sasuke couldn't help but feel envy for Naruto's new life, free from the burden of their past and the shackles of the Red Scarves.

As Naruto's reputation grew, so did his list of acquaintances. News of the "Sonic" delivery boy even reached the ears of Kakashi Hatake, now fifteen-years-old and the adopted son of Neera Li. Despite their shared history, Naruto and Kakashi had yet to cross paths in Freedom Planet. So the day they finally reconnected was a heartfelt reunion filled with nostalgia and mutual respect.

In time, Naruto's new job not only provided for his family but also became a source of pride and accomplishment. His desire to help others and his incredible speed made him a local hero in the city of Shuigang, known far and wide as the fastest delivery boy around.

Even in the shadows, Sasuke kept close watch on Naruto's progress, his bitterness slowly fading and being replaced by curiosity and conflicting emotions. Could a life free from the Red Scarves and Spade truly be possible for him too? Naruto's incredible journey from thief to hero planted a seed of doubt and hope in Sasuke's heart, serving as a stark reminder that sometimes, fate could be changed... and maybe, just maybe, he could change his too.

And thus, in the chaotic world of Freedom Planet, the young Naruto embarked on the first step of his new life journey, building his reputation and finding happiness by giving back to the community. Amidst the adventure awaiting him, his new job helped him connect with his friends, forge new relationships, and start healing the wounds from his painful past.

NARUTO'S THREE FORMS. Super naruto This form is unlocked when naruto accidentally touched the Kingdom Stone, naruto is very powerful in this form even calling his Super Form a Power Boost. Hyper naruto This form is unlocked when naruto is balanced with positive energy and negative energy, naruto is extremely powerful even more powerful than the Kingdom Stone. Dark naruto. naruto's raw anger is unleashed in this form, no longer being the kind-hearted boy but he can be calmed down by Lilac and Milla the two people naruto is close to.

As Naruto's adventures progressed in Freedom Planet, he discovered that he could access three powerful forms, each with its own unique abilities and consequences.

1. Super Naruto: While exploring the ancient ruins of Freedom Planet, Naruto accidentally touched the Kingdom Stone, a mystical artifact known to contain immense energy. The resulting surge of power transformed him into Super Naruto, boosting his abilities and making him nearly invincible. However, this form was not without its drawbacks; the extreme rush of energy could be difficult for Naruto to control and maintain for extended periods.

2. Hyper Naruto: As Naruto continued his journey and learned to balance his internal energies, he discovered a way to enter a new form, Hyper Naruto. By perfectly balancing positive and negative energies within his body, Naruto became even more powerful than when using the Kingdom Stone. This form granted him greater speed, strength, and agility, as well as improved chakra control. However, maintaining this perfect balance proved to be a challenge, causing the Hyper Naruto form to be unstable and difficult to master.

3. Dark Naruto: In times of extreme emotional distress and raw anger, Naruto's darker side emerged in a form known as Dark Naruto. Fueled by his unbridled rage, this form provided Naruto with incredible power but revoked his kind-hearted nature, making him a danger to both his allies and enemies alike. Luckily, two individuals could break through to him and bring him back to his senses: his adoptive mother Lilac and his best friend and crush, Milla. Their connection to Naruto helped ground him and reminded him of the reasons he fought so hard to protect Freedom Planet.

Despite their powerful nature, these three forms also acted as a reminder to Naruto of the importance of self-control, balance, and care for those around him. Relying too much on any one of these forms could compromise his values and potentially cause harm to those he loves. Recognizing the responsibility that came with this power, Naruto vowed to use his abilities only when necessary and always prioritize the well-being of his friends and family. As a result, these forms became not just tools for Naruto to wield but valuable lessons in the never-ending journey of self-discovery and growth.
naruto Move/Details

Naruto has an extensive skillset that combines his chakra control, dragon powers, ninja training, and astounding speed. Here are some of the signature moves he uses throughout his journey in Freedom Planet:

1. Aqua Clone: Naruto creates a clone of himself using his water powers. The Aqua Clone can attack enemies, confounding them and allowing Naruto to strike with surprise.

2. Wind Palm Strike: Channeling his wind chakra into his palm, Naruto unleashes a powerful gust of wind that knocks back enemies or deflects projectiles and attacks.

3. Dragon Wave: Tapping into his dragon heritage, Naruto sends a surge of water in the form of a dragon at his foes, causing significant damage upon impact.

4. Aqua Shuriken: Merging his ninja and dragon abilities, Naruto creates shurikens made of water that he hurls at his enemies with precision and incredible speed.

5. Scarf Boost: Using his enchanted red scarf, Naruto propels himself forward at breakneck speeds, creating an air dash that allows him to reach high platforms or evade enemy attacks.

6. Rasengan: A technique inherited from his father, Naruto uses his chakra to form a swirling sphere in his hand, which he then propels into his enemies, causing significant damage.

7. Chakra Chains: Naruto manipulates chakra to create chains that can bind enemies, hold objects in place, or act as a grappling hook for added mobility.

8. Stealth Mode: Drawing on his ninja training, Naruto can slip into the shadows and remain undetected by his enemies, allowing him to move about unseen and launch surprising attacks.

9. Sakura Dance: In collaboration with his friend Sakura Haruno, Naruto and Sakura create a flurry of powerful blows, launching their enemy into the air and finishing off with an overhead strike.

10. Team Ninjutsu: Naruto, Sasuke, Shikamaru, Sakura, and Rock Lee come together in a combined attack, unleashing a powerful blast of ninjutsu that devastates any opponents caught in its path.

As Naruto's journey in Freedom Planet continues, he keeps refining and enhancing his techniques, learning new combinations and moves that draw upon his adaptable nature and the varying powers of his friends and allies. With each challenge that he faces, Naruto's abilities grow stronger, and he becomes an ever more formidable guardian of his new home.
naruto Gameplay Attributes Freedom Planet and freedom planet 2

In a hypothetical game featuring Naruto's adventures in Freedom Planet and Freedom Planet 2, the gameplay attributes would combine the fast-paced platform and action mechanics of Freedom Planet series and the varied techniques from Naruto's repertoire.

1. Speed & Agility: Being the "Sonic" delivery boy, Naruto's speed would be unmatched, allowing for high-velocity movements, jumps, and dashes along with quick and fluid combat.

2. Chakra Control: A core element of Naruto's gameplay would involve managing his chakra, with specific moves consuming different amounts of chakra. Players must balance between using powerful abilities and conserving chakra for critical situations.

3. Form Shifting: Accessing Super Naruto, Hyper Naruto, and Dark Naruto forms during gameplay would provide temporary power boosts and unique abilities that could help overcome challenging bosses and obstacles.

4. Combo System: Naruto's diverse skillset allows for stringing together various moves, making for engaging and stylish gameplay. Furthermore, combo moves with friends like Sakura, Shikamaru, and Rock Lee add variety and depth to the combat system.

5. Stealth Mechanics: Naruto's ninja training lends itself well to stealth gameplay, letting players choose to bypass enemies undetected or take them down silently for added rewards.

6. Co-Op Mode: Friendly characters such as Sasuke, Milla, and Lilac could join Naruto, offering unique playstyles and opportunities for creative teamwork during gameplay, either in local or online multiplayer.

7. Character Progression: As players advance through the game, they can unlock new abilities, combos, and form upgrades that strengthen Naruto's fighting prowess and adapt to the ever-increasing challenges.

8. Puzzles & Exploration: Leveraging Naruto's skills to solve puzzles and access hidden areas would add depth to the gameplay, encouraging players to explore and utilize their full arsenal of techniques.

9. Time Attack Challenges: Naruto's exceptional speed and the game's delivery-themed background make for thrilling time attack challenges where players can compete to achieve the fastest delivery times or complete stages in record time.

10. Emotional Storytelling: As a blend of both the Freedom Planet and Naruto universes, the game would feature a deeply touching and character-driven narrative, with each cutscene and dialogue option resonating with players and immersing them in Naruto's journey.

In summary, a game combining Naruto's journey in Freedom Planet and Freedom Planet 2 would present players with engaging gameplay and captivating storytelling. With a rich and varied move set, teamwork with friends, and transformative forms, players would embark on an exciting adventure alongside Naruto as he learns the true meaning of heroism, family, and the power of friendship.
naruto Theme Song: naruto/Freedom Planet, Name song

Considering the essence of both Naruto and Freedom Planet in a crossover, an apt name for the theme song could be:

"Path of the Swift Guardian"

This title reflects Naruto's incredible speed, his role as a protector of Freedom Planet, and the combination of his ninja and dragon origins. The theme song would encapsulate the energy, determination, and friendship that unites Naruto and his allies in their quest for justice and peace.
Characters Playable Sash Lilac and Carol Tea and Milla Basset and Neera Li and Sash naruto and sasuke and Kakashi li

In a game featuring the adventures of Naruto in the world of Freedom Planet, players would be able to choose from a diverse roster of playable characters, each with their own unique abilities and gameplay styles.

1. Sash Lilac: The dragon-girl would rely on her swift moves, powerful water and wind attacks, as well as her acrobatic skills to overcome obstacles and enemies.

2. Carol Tea: As a wildcat, Carol's agility and strength would translate into deadly combos and extendable claw attacks. She could also gain access to her powerful motorcycle for added speed and mobility.

3. Milla Basset: Milla's unique ability to create energy cubes and use them as projectiles or shields would make her a versatile character in both offense and defense. Being a hound, she also possesses heightened senses, which could allow players to detect hidden objects or secret passages.

4. Neera Li: The ice warrior would harness the power of ice to unleash freezing attacks, create defensive barriers, and even slide on icy surfaces for quick traversal.

5. Sash Naruto: The young hero would possess a dynamic blend of ninja techniques and dragon powers, resulting in a unique and adaptable playstyle. Players could also switch between his three forms (Super Naruto, Hyper Naruto, and Dark Naruto) for added strategic depth.

6. Sasuke: Combining his fire and lightning powers, Sasuke would be a formidable character both at close range and from a distance. With his skill in Taijutsu and Genjutsu, he would excel in combat against multiple enemies, while also using his Sharingan for advanced tactics.

7. Kakashi Li: The adopted son of Neera Li and former mentor to Naruto, Kakashi would wield his iconic Sharingan, Lightning Blade, and other ninjutsu abilities with deadly precision. He could also use his vast knowledge of strategy to outwit opponents and gain an advantage in battle.

These playable characters would provide players with a multifaceted gaming experience, encouraging them to explore different playstyles and team combinations. Each character's unique background and skillset would contribute to an engaging and dynamic gameplay, as well as a rich and connected narrative that immerses players in the intertwined worlds of Freedom Planet and Naruto.
Stages

In a game combining the worlds of Naruto and Freedom Planet, players would travel through various stages that showcase the unique landscapes and challenges of both universes. Here are some possible stages for such a game:

1. Dragon Valley: This lush, vibrant landscape serves as an introduction to the game, allowing players to familiarize themselves with their chosen character's abilities while navigating ancient ruins and battling foes.

2. Konoha Village: A stage set in the heart of the Hidden Leaf Village, where players traverse rooftops, explore winding alleys, and face enemies from Naruto's world.

3. Shuigang City: Set in the bustling metropolis of Shuigang, players must navigate through busy streets, avoid or engage in urban combat, and even scale skyscrapers to progress.

4. Forest of Shadows: A mysterious and foreboding area filled with towering trees and shrouded in darkness, where stealth is key, and players must rely on their senses and cunning to navigate.

5. Thermal Base: This stage challenges players to infiltrate a highly-secured facility guarded by high-tech robots and security measures. Players must use their unique abilities and teamwork to bypass obstacles, disable security systems, and make their way through the intricate structure.

6. Aurora Canyon: A dazzling icy stage where players traverse frozen cliffs, confront chilling enemies, and utilize ice slides to speed through the terrain.

7. Sky Battalion: Players must navigate multiple airships while taking on aerial enemies and avoiding hazards like powerful gusts of wind and electrical storms.

8. Chunin Exams Arena: Set in the famous arena from Naruto, players partake in increasingly difficult fights against opponents, testing their combat skills and adaptability in high-pressure situations.

9. Brevon's Fortress: The final stage, where players infiltrate the stronghold of the evil Lord Brevon, face powerful enemies from both worlds, and ultimately come face-to-face with the menacing villain to save Freedom Planet and Naruto's home.

These stages would offer a diverse range of environments and challenges for players to overcome, presenting opportunities for strategic planning, environmental puzzle-solving, and thrilling combat encounters. Exploring both the familiar and the unknown, players would embark on a memorable journey through these interconnected worlds.
Sash Lilac and Carol Tea and Milla Basset and Neera Li and Sash Naruto and Sasuke and Kakashi Li in freedom planet and freedom planet 2 style

Incorporating Naruto and his fellow characters into the aesthetics of Freedom Planet and Freedom Planet 2, each character would be adapted to fit the unique visual style while maintaining their distinct features and abilities from the Naruto universe.

1. Sash Lilac: Already a native character in Freedom Planet, she would retain her appearance as a purple-scaled water dragon with her iconic red hair and ponytail.

2. Carol Tea: Carol would also continue to possess her distinct wildcat appearance, complete with green fur, goggles, and signature attire.

3. Milla Basset: As the friendly hound, Milla would maintain her cute appearance with her fluffy ears and tail, as well as her green dress.

4. Neera Li: The ice warrior would retain her confident pose and uniform, with striking eyes and a no-nonsense attitude that showcases her dedication to law and order.

5. Sash Naruto: Adapting Naruto in Freedom Planet's style, he would keep his spiky yellow hair, whisker markings, and trademark red scarf while featuring a blend of ninja attire and dragon-themed design elements, such as scales and reptilian eyes.

6. Sasuke: In Freedom Planet's style, Sasuke would maintain his brooding appearance, complete with dark hair and Sharingan eyes. His outfit could combine traditional ninja attire with planet-based elements or symbols, and he would don his signature sword for combat.

7. Kakashi Li: Integrating the world of Naruto with Freedom Planet, Kakashi Li would retain his recognizable silver hair and masked face, along with his single exposed Sharingan eye. He could wear armor similar to that of Neera Li, blending his original style with the appearance of Freedom Planet characters.

By adapting these characters to the vibrant, detailed art style of Freedom Planet and Freedom Planet 2, players would enjoy a unique and refreshing crossover experience. Drawing from the distinct characteristics of each character, the game would present a visually cohesive mix of worlds, paying homage to the essence of both universes while breathing new life into these beloved characters.
